name: Solana Agent Kit
description: Onchain actions on Solana — transfers, swaps, token ops. Irreversible chain; prefer setups that sign in a separate wallet and never put a funded key in config.

SOLANA_PRIVATE_KEY.description: Wallet private key, supplied as an env var. Use a low-value wallet only; never a key holding real funds.

RPC_URL.description: Solana RPC endpoint, supplied as an env var.
